Class Boomerang

java.lang.Object
MyGame.GameObject.GameObject
MyGame.GameObject.Projectile.Projectile
MyGame.GameObject.Projectile.Boomerang
All Implemented Interfaces:
Renderable
public class Boomerang extends Projectile
A projectile that travels outward and then returns towards its origin.
